Title: Parcel warns about redundant Babel config on app start
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Run npm run dev:frontend from repo root; 2) Observe startup logs; 3) Warning references frontend/.babelrc and @babel/preset-env
Root Cause: Parcel already performs transpilation and the custom Babel presets were redundant for this setup
Fix Implemented: Removed frontend/.babelrc to rely on Parcel default transpilation target handling
Verification: Restarted frontend dev server; startup completes and warning is no longer emitted
